summary: Iteration 88 - Operational Escalations and Due Dates feature testing completed. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirms Operations Queue displays escalation summary cards (Due Soon, Overdue, Escalated), color-coded badges, due dates with days late/to due indicators, escalation filter dropdown, and EscalationSection component works in SO workflow view for setting/updating due dates and manual escalation.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/escalations - creates escalation with on_track status for future date
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/escalations - creates with due_soon status for date within 3 days
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/escalations - creates with overdue status for past date
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/escalations - returns 422 for invalid entity_type
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/escalations - returns 404 for non-existent PO Draft
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/escalations - lists all escalations
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/escalations?entity_type=sales_order - filters by entity_type
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/escalations?entity_id=X - filters by entity_id
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/escalations/{id} - updates due_date and re-derives status
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/escalations/{id} - manual escalation preserves escalated status
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/escalations/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent escalation
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/escalations/{id} - returns 422 for invalid escalation_status
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue - returns due_soon_count, overdue_count, escalated_count
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue - items have due_date, escalation_status, days_to_due, days_overdue
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue?escalation=overdue - filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue?escalation=due_soon - filters correctly
Backend: Priority score boosted by escalation: due_soon +10, overdue +20, escalated +30
Backend: Derived status - due date today = due_soon
Backend: Derived status - due date 3 days = due_soon
Backend: Derived status - due date 4 days = on_track
Backend: Manual escalated status preserved even with future due date
Backend: SO summary endpoint includes escalation enrichment fields
Backend: PO Draft detail endpoint includes escalation enrichment fields
Frontend: Operations Queue page loads at /operations-queue
Frontend: Summary cards show Total Queue, High Priority, Due Soon, Overdue, Escalated counts
Frontend: Escalation filter dropdown present with options (all, due_soon, overdue, escalated, on_track)
Frontend: Table displays Escalation column with color-coded badges
Frontend: Table displays Due Date column with days late/to due indicators
Frontend: Row detail panel shows escalation info in Actions Required
Frontend: EscalationSection visible in SO workflow (Record BC Shipment dialog)
Frontend: EscalationSection has due date input field
Frontend: EscalationSection has Set button to save due date
Frontend: EscalationSection has Escalate button for manual escalation
Frontend: EscalationSection shows derived status badge (Overdue/Due Soon/On Track/Escalated)
Frontend: Due date save shows success toast 'Due date saved'
Frontend: Overdue items show days late indicator (e.g., '53d late')
critical_code_review_comments: Backend escalation endpoints at lines 3371-3473: POST (create/upsert), GET (list), PATCH (update)
Derived status logic at lines 3307-3321: overdue for past, due_soon for <=3 days, on_track for >3 days, escalated preserved
Priority score boost at line 3296: ESCALATION_SCORE = {due_soon: 10, overdue: 20, escalated: 30}
Operations Queue enrichment at lines 3572-3586 (SO) and 3651-3664 (PO Draft)
Frontend EscalationSection component at lines 858-932 in InventoryLedgerPage.js
Frontend Operations Queue escalation display at lines 226-236 in OperationsQueuePage.js

seed_data_used.test_escalations: Multiple test escalations created with TEST- prefix

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 - Escalations feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/escalations. GET /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue now returns escalation fields (due_date, escalation_status, days_to_due, days_overdue) and counts (due_soon_count, overdue_count, escalated_count). Priority score boosted: due_soon +10, overdue +20, escalated +30. Frontend: Operations Queue page shows escalation summary cards and color-coded badges. EscalationSection component in InventoryLedgerPage.js used in SO workflow (ShipmentCaptureDialog) and PO Draft detail drawer. Derived status logic: past date = overdue, <=3 days = due_soon, >3 days = on_track, manual escalated = preserved.

derived_status_logic.escalated: manually set, preserved regardless of due_date
